expect: Performative grounding gap: >50% of External: headers reference genuine external knowledge (papers, theorists, theories) that COULD be structurally grounded but isn't. Falsified if <30% of External: headers reference verifiable external sources.
actual: CONFIRMED at 73.9% (34/46 External: headers contain genuine author+year academic citations). 82.4% performative gap rate (28/34 genuine external refs have zero structural grounding in Cites:). Root cause: Cites: header format only accepts L-/P-/F-/B- references. Format impossibility, not behavioral decay.
diff: Expected >50% genuine external: CONFIRMED at 73.9%. Root cause NOT behavioral decay (L-601) but format constraint. The External: field contains real knowledge (Lakatos, Ostrom, Barabasi etc.) that cannot structurally propagate. L-1258 updated with root cause.

data.root_cause: Cites: header format constraint — only L-/P-/F-/B-NNN accepted
data.fix_direction: Extend Cites: format to accept EXT:Author-Year nodes

verdict: CONFIRMED — 73.9% genuine external, 82.4% gap. Format constraint, not behavioral decay.
